requirement_topic.en: EMC and Harmonics — 60 Hz FSM Grid, IEEE / UL Direction, and Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和谐波——60 Hz FSM电网、IEEE / UL方向及项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和諧波——60 Hz FSM電網、IEEE / UL方向及項目證據

summary.en: For FSM PV projects, EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared for a 60 Hz, 120/240 V context and for interconnection documents required by the relevant state utility and DRD filing. IEEE 1547 and UL 1741-style inverter evidence may be requested because FSM follows a US-aligned island-grid model. IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence can still be useful as technical support, but exporters should not assume a 50 Hz China GB/T 37408 EMC package or EN 50549/VDE grid evidence is sufficient without FSM project review.
summary.zh: FSM光伏项目中，EMC和电能质量证据应按60 Hz、120/240 V工况并按相关州公用事业及DRD报备文件要求准备。FSM采用美国体系的海岛电网模型，可能会要求IEEE 1547和UL 1741式逆变器证据。IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC证据可作为技术支持，但出口商不得假设50 Hz中国GB/T 37408 EMC文件或欧洲EN 50549/VDE并网文件在FSM项目审查前已充分。
summary.zht: FSM光伏項目中，EMC與電能品質證據應按60 Hz、120/240 V工況並按相關州公共事業及DRD報備文件要求準備。FSM採用美國體系的海島電網模型，可能要求IEEE 1547與UL 1741式逆變器證據。IEC 62920與IEC 61000系列EMC證據可作為技術支持，但出口商不應假設50 Hz中國GB/T 37408 EMC文件或歐洲EN 50549/VDE並網文件在FSM項目審查前已足夠。

standards_or_laws: IEEE 1547 — Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces
UL 1741 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources
IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — EMC and harmonic test methods and limits

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC files commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and CNAS test reports under Chinese domestic conditions. These documents may cover China domestic 220/380 V, 50 Hz behavior but do not automatically prove compliance on FSM 120/240 V 60 Hz operation with US-aligned IEEE/UL expectations.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC文件通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及中国国内条件下的CNAS测试报告。这些文件可覆盖中国220/380 V、50 Hz情景，但不能直接证明符合FSM 120/240 V 60 Hz工况下的美国体系IEEE/UL项目要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC文件通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及中國國內條件下的CNAS測試報告。這些文件可覆蓋中國220/380 V、50 Hz情境，但不能直接證明符合FSM 120/240 V 60 Hz工況下美國體系IEEE/UL項目要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
CNAS-accredited China domestic EMC and power-quality test reports

gap.en: Gap: determine whether the inverter will be deployed as split-phase 120/240 V, three-phase 60 Hz, or transformer-coupled architecture, then map EMC and harmonic evidence to the exact FSM configuration and state utility process. Chinese EMC evidence should be screened for this 60 Hz hardware context and re-tested where required by the project utility or owner. EN 50549 or EU-style artifacts are not FSM substitutes.
gap.zh: 差距：先判断逆变器按分相120/240 V、三相60 Hz还是变压器耦合架构部署，再将EMC与谐波证据映射到具体FSM配置和州公用事业流程。中国EMC证据需按FSM 60 Hz硬件场景筛查，必要时按项目公用事业或业主要求重新测试。EN 50549或欧洲风格材料不能替代FSM要求。
gap.zht: 差距：先判斷逆變器係以分相120/240 V、三相60 Hz或變壓器耦合架構部署，再將EMC與諧波證據映射到具體FSM配置及州公共事業流程。中國EMC證據需按FSM 60 Hz硬件場景篩查，必要時按項目公共事業或業主要求重新測試。EN 50549或歐洲風格文件不能取代FSM要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required by state utility and project-owner acceptance in FSM, especially where IEEE 1547, UL 1741, and harmonic limits are specified
mandatory_status.cn: China CNAS test reports are domestic evidence and are not automatically accepted for FSM utility acceptance

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat a China 50 Hz GB/T 37408 EMC package as complete FSM evidence. Confirm the exact FSM operating mode and utility-requested standard set, then provide IEC 62920/IEC 61000, IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 evidence as required before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应把中国50 Hz GB/T 37408 EMC文件包视为完整FSM证据。提交前应确认FSM具体运行模式和州公用事业要求的标准集合，并在必要时提供IEC 62920、IEC 61000、IEEE 1547和UL 1741证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國50 Hz GB/T 37408 EMC文件包視為完整FSM證據。提交前應確認FSM具體運行模式及州公共事業要求的標準集合，並在必要時提供IEC 62920、IEC 61000、IEEE 1547與UL 1741證據。
